content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Market is deeply bifurcated today: FMCG/Power/select financials rallying hard while IT collapses (HCLTECH -10.6%, INFY -5% pre-results post-market). Book is already 79% deployed with minimal remaining capacity; INFY binary event (3:45 PM results) adds near-term volatility risk. Deployment hysteresis applies — priority is risk management on existing 10 holdings, not new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24130,
      "nifty_resistance": 24310
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Bounced to 77.62 from intraday low; Q4 FY26 was strong (PAT +35% YoY, GNPA 1.45%, best-in-class CASA). Thesis intact; stock reclaimed ground. Setting SL at 74.50 (~4% below CMP, below recent swing support 72) and target 88 (fresh 52w high extension). RR ~1.6:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "new_target": 1150.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up +10.45% today on Q4 beat (PAT +19%, GNPA<1%). Multiple broker upgrades (MS 1160, MOSL 1200, ICICI Sec 1350). Trail SL to 955 (slightly below entry, locking in near-breakeven) with target 1150 toward MS TP. RR 1.8:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Marginal loss, defensive hedge against macro/geopolitical uncertainty. Will set SL at 118 (below April lows) and target 135 via position_action note."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1620.00,
      "new_target": 1900.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Up +6.2% today at fresh 52w high (1706). Nabha deal + summer demand + JM Financial top pick. Trail SL to 1620 (locking ~ -2% below entry as breakeven buffer, just below R1 pivot) with target 1900 toward consensus TP range. RR ~2.3:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1360.00,
      "new_target": 1520.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 blowout (PAT +27%, revenue +22.6%, 18% volume growth) pushed to fresh 52w high. Tight SL at 1360 (~3.7% below CMP, protects against sell-on-news reversal given P/E 72-80). Target 1520. RR 1.5:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1020.00,
      "new_target": 1150.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Up +5.9% at fresh 52w high. Strong Q4 business update (deposits +22.8%, advances +25.1%). Q4 results due Apr 25-27 — binary event. SL at 1020 (~3.5% below CMP), target 1150. RR 1.8:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 660.00,
      "new_target": 745.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Breakout to new 52w high on 3.7x volume. USFDA Form 483 (procedural). Q4 results Apr 29. SL 660 below 20-SMA buffer, target 745. RR 1.8:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2310.00,
      "new_target": 2550.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up +6.6% on FMCG defensive rotation. Q4 results Apr 28/30 — binary event. SL at 2310 (below today's open and entry), target 2550. RR 2.2:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 390.00,
      "new_target": 435.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Defensive PSU power with summer tailwind. Record FY26 capacity additions; NGEL crossed 10GW. Q4 results May 15. SL 390 (below 20-SMA 377 buffered), target 435. RR ~2.9:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 202.00,
      "new_target": 240.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Fresh 52w high (215.71). +21.5% over 9 sessions raises overbought risk; shooting star on Apr 20. Trail SL tight at 202 (locks in ~ -6% downside max), target 240. Q4 results Apr 29 binary. RR ~2.1:1."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact post strong Q4. Hold with defined SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in near-breakeven after +10% rally. Momentum strong with broker TP upgrades."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 118.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive allocation; minor drawdown, hold for macro hedge."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1620.00,
      "reasoning": "Trailing SL below R1 pivot locks gains while allowing further run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1360.00,
      "reasoning": "Protect against post-results sell-on-news at P/E 72-80x."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1020.00,
      "reasoning": "Pre-Q4 results tight SL; strong business update supports hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 660.00,
      "reasoning": "Volume breakout; SL below 20-SMA."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 2310.00,
      "reasoning": "Pre-Q4 binary event; SL below today's open for protection."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 390.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive utility; summer tailwind intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 202.00,
      "reasoning": "Sharp rally + shooting star pattern warrants tight SL."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Keeping on watch but not trading: DEEPAKNTR (bearish fundamentals despite +12.7% move — Prabhudas REDUCE TP 1354), DRREDDY/CIPLA/AUROPHARMA (pharma rotation — revisit if book frees up), OFSS/JIOFINL (catalyst plays — wait for pullback), INFY/HCLTECH (avoid until post-results clarity and sector stabilization), ADANIENSOL (power cluster already heavy — TORNTPOWER+ADANIPOWER+NTPC is enough), DATAPATTNS (+16% gap chase — wait for consolidation), WIPRO (buyback arbitrage needs fresh capital).",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 79% deployed with only INR 14K remaining capacity — no room for new entries without trimming. Power cluster (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER) totals ~INR 164K = ~16% of capital, below 20% cluster limit but near watch level. FMCG cluster (NESTLEIND + HINDUNILVR) ~INR 167K = ~17%. Today's priority was establishing SL/target discipline on all 10 positions that had zero risk management set. Avoiding new entries ahead of INFY results (3:45 PM) which could drag broader IT and market. Will reassess fresh entries tomorrow after INFY guidance digested and if any existing position gets stopped out. No MIS entries — past 2:30 PM would be, and no compelling setup worth the risk."
}
